meaning_en: the place where someone lives
example: Please write your home address on the form.

meaning_en: the family name that you share with your parents
example: Her surname is Nguyen, and her first name is Lan.

meaning_en: the country that someone belongs to
example: What is your nationality? I am Vietnamese.

meaning_en: how old a person is
example: Please write your age and date of birth here.

meaning_en: the day each year that is the same as the day you were born
example: My birthday is on the fifteenth of May.

meaning_en: a small book that lets you travel to other countries
example: You must show your passport at the airport.

meaning_en: a paper with questions that you answer
example: Please fill in this form before you see the doctor.

meaning_en: your name written in your own way
example: Put your signature at the bottom of the page.

meaning_en: the first letter of a name
example: His initial is T, for Thanh.

meaning_en: how tall a person is
example: What is your height? I am one metre sixty.

meaning_en: belonging to a boy or a man
example: Please tick male or female on the form.

meaning_en: belonging to a girl or a woman
example: She is a female student in my class.

meaning_en: having a husband or wife
example: My parents are married and live in Hanoi.

meaning_en: not married
example: She is single and lives with her sister.

meaning_en: complete, with nothing missing
example: Please write your full name on the paper.

meaning_en: to tell someone another person's name for the first time
example: Let me introduce my friend to you.

meaning_en: to finish or fill in something
example: Please complete this form before you go.

meaning_en: to write information in the empty spaces
example: Fill in your name and address here.

meaning_en: a child of your aunt or uncle
example: My cousin lives in another city with her family.

meaning_en: the son of your brother or sister
example: I bought a toy for my nephew on his birthday.

meaning_en: the daughter of your brother or sister
example: My niece is learning to read at school now.

meaning_en: a person in your family
example: We visit our relatives every summer holiday.

meaning_en: two children born at the same time to the same mother
example: The twins in my class look exactly the same.

meaning_en: the son of your child
example: My grandfather loves playing with his grandson.

meaning_en: the daughter of your child
example: Their granddaughter is only five years old.

meaning_en: a ceremony when two people get married
example: My brother's wedding is next Saturday.

meaning_en: the oldest of a group of children in a family
example: She is the eldest of three sisters.

meaning_en: knowing someone well and liking them
example: I am very close to my best friend.

meaning_en: someone who lives near you
example: My neighbour is a kind old woman next door.

meaning_en: someone you invite to your home or event
example: We had three guests for dinner last night.

meaning_en: kind and pleasant to people
example: The new girl in my class is very friendly.

meaning_en: to ask someone to come to a place or event
example: I will invite my friends to my birthday party.

meaning_en: to use or have something with another person
example: My brother and I share a small bedroom.

meaning_en: to take care of someone or something
example: She looks after her little brother after school.

meaning_en: to become an adult
example: I want to be a doctor when I grow up.

meaning_en: a thing that you study at school, like maths or history
example: Maths is my favourite subject at school.

meaning_en: a time when a teacher teaches you something
example: We have an English lesson every morning.

meaning_en: an important test at school
example: I have a maths exam next Monday.

meaning_en: a short set of questions to check what you know
example: Our teacher gave us a short test today.

meaning_en: a mark or number that shows how well you did
example: She got a good grade in the science test.

meaning_en: a short activity for practising something
example: Please do exercise five on page ten.

meaning_en: a small book of empty pages for writing notes
example: I write new words in my notebook.

meaning_en: a book that tells you what words mean
example: I use a dictionary to check new words.

meaning_en: special clothes that students wear at school
example: All students wear a blue uniform to school.

meaning_en: a room where you have lessons at school
example: There are twenty desks in our classroom.

meaning_en: one of the three parts of the school year
example: The new school term starts in September.

meaning_en: to succeed in a test or exam
example: She was happy because she passed her exam.

meaning_en: to not pass a test or exam
example: He was sad because he failed the maths test.

meaning_en: to study again before a test
example: I need to revise for my English exam tonight.

meaning_en: to act in a good or bad way
example: The children behave well in class.

meaning_vi: thuộc cấp hai, trung học cơ sở
meaning_en: for children between about 11 and 16 years old
example: My brother goes to a secondary school in the city.

meaning_en: able to learn and understand things quickly
example: She is a clever student who learns fast.

meaning_en: in a way that shows care and attention
example: Please read the question carefully before you answer.

meaning_en: to heat a liquid until it becomes very hot and makes bubbles
example: I boil the eggs for ten minutes.

meaning_en: to cook food inside an oven using dry heat
example: I want to bake a chocolate cake.

meaning_en: to cook food in hot oil
example: You can fry the fish in hot oil.

meaning_en: to put different things together to make one thing
example: Mix the eggs and milk together.

meaning_en: to move a spoon around in a liquid to mix it
example: Stir the soup with a big spoon.

meaning_en: to make a liquid flow out of a container into another place
example: Please pour the juice into my glass.

meaning_en: to cut something into thin flat pieces
example: Can you slice the bread for me?

meaning_en: the feeling of food or drink in your mouth
example: This cake has a very sweet taste.

meaning_en: having a very nice taste
example: The soup is very delicious today.

meaning_en: having a strong, hot flavour from spices
example: I love spicy food like curry.

meaning_en: having a lot of salt in it
example: This pizza is too salty for me.

meaning_en: having a sharp, acid taste like a lemon
example: Lemons have a sour taste.

meaning_en: wanting or needing a drink
example: I'm very thirsty after the football game.

meaning_en: sweet food eaten at the end of a meal
example: We have ice cream for dessert.

meaning_en: a list of food and drinks you can order in a restaurant
example: Can I see the menu, please?

meaning_en: a man who serves food in a restaurant
example: The waiter brings our food quickly.

meaning_en: an occasion when you eat food, or the food you eat
example: Dinner is my favourite meal of the day.

meaning_en: to eat in a restaurant, not at home
example: We eat out at a restaurant on Saturdays.

meaning_vi: ở nước ngoài, ra nước ngoài
meaning_en: in or to a different country
example: My sister is going abroad for her holiday this year.

meaning_en: to get to a place
example: The train arrives at the station at nine o'clock.

meaning_en: to go from one place to another
example: We travel to the beach by car every summer.

meaning_en: to arrange to have a ticket or a room
example: I want to book a hotel room for two nights.

meaning_en: to go across from one side to another
example: Please cross the road when the light is green.

meaning_en: when a plane leaves the ground and flies
example: The plane will take off in ten minutes.

meaning_en: a place where planes take off and land
example: We waited two hours at the airport for our flight.

meaning_en: the act of travelling from one place to another
example: The journey from London to Paris takes three hours.

meaning_en: the bags you take with you when you travel
example: You can take one piece of luggage on the plane.

meaning_en: a person travelling in a car, bus or plane
example: The bus can carry fifty passengers.

meaning_en: a journey made in a plane
example: Our flight to Rome was late this morning.

meaning_en: a short journey to a place and back
example: We went on a trip to the mountains last weekend.

meaning_en: a person who visits a place for fun
example: Many tourists come to this city in summer.

meaning_en: the place where people wait for a train
example: The train to Oxford leaves from platform three.

meaning_en: vehicles that carry people from place to place
example: Public transport in this city is very cheap.

meaning_en: full of people
example: The beach was very crowded on Sunday.

meaning_en: nice and pleasant to sit or rest on
example: The seats on the new bus are very comfortable.

meaning_en: a piece of paper that shows you have paid for something
example: Please keep your receipt if you want to return the shoes.

meaning_en: a person who buys things from a shop
example: The customer bought three shirts in the shop today.

meaning_en: something you buy for a good, low price
example: These shoes were only five pounds, what a bargain!

meaning_en: money in the form of notes and coins
example: You can pay by cash or by credit card.

meaning_en: a small flat case for carrying paper money and cards
example: I keep my money and cards in my wallet.

meaning_en: a small plastic card used to buy things and pay later
example: My dad paid for the TV with his credit card.

meaning_en: the amount of money you pay for something
example: The price of this jacket is forty pounds.

meaning_en: a time when a shop sells things at lower prices
example: I bought this dress in the summer sale.

meaning_en: the money you get back when you pay too much
example: Here is your change, two pounds and fifty pence.

meaning_en: money that parents give to children to spend
example: She saves half of her pocket money every week.

meaning_en: to give money to buy things
example: I spent ten pounds on a new book.

meaning_en: to keep money and not spend it
example: He is saving money to buy a new bike.

meaning_en: to take money that you will give back later
example: Can I borrow five pounds until Monday?

meaning_en: to give money to someone who will give it back
example: My brother lent me twenty pounds yesterday.

meaning_en: to decide which thing you want to buy or have
example: You can choose any colour you like.

meaning_en: to take something back to the shop because it is not right
example: I want to return this shirt because it is too small.

meaning_en: not new; used before by someone else
example: He bought a second-hand bike from his friend.

meaning_en: to put on clothes or shoes to see if they fit
example: Can I try on these shoes, please?

meaning_en: an activity you do for pleasure in your free time
example: My hobby is collecting old coins.

meaning_en: to bring things together as a hobby
example: I collect stamps from different countries.

meaning_en: a musical instrument with six strings
example: He plays the guitar in a small band.

meaning_en: a board game for two players
example: We play chess after school every day.

meaning_en: a building where you can look at old or interesting things
example: We visited the science museum last weekend.

meaning_en: an event where people try to win by being the best
example: She won first prize in the singing competition.

meaning_en: something you win in a competition
example: The winner got a big prize.

meaning_en: to rest and feel calm
example: I relax and listen to music after dinner.

meaning_en: to get pleasure from something
example: I enjoy reading books on rainy days.

meaning_en: to make a picture with a pen or pencil
example: She likes to draw animals in her notebook.

meaning_en: a group of people who meet for a shared interest
example: I joined the chess club at school.

meaning_en: a performance of music in front of people
example: We went to a pop concert last night.

meaning_en: a meal you eat outside, usually in a park
example: We had a picnic in the park on Sunday.

meaning_en: to travel on a bicycle, horse, or motorbike
example: I ride my bike to the park.

meaning_en: giving you pleasure to learn about
example: This book about dinosaurs is very interesting.

meaning_en: not interesting at all
example: The film was long and very boring.

meaning_en: outside, in the open air
example: Children love to play outdoors on sunny days.

meaning_en: to leave your home to do something fun
example: We go out for pizza on Fridays.

meaning_en: a white or grey mass in the sky, made of water
example: There are many dark clouds in the sky today.

meaning_en: very bad weather with strong wind and rain
example: A big storm came last night and broke the tree.

meaning_en: one of the four parts of the year
example: Spring is my favourite season of the year.

meaning_en: a piece of land on a farm where crops grow
example: The cows are sleeping in the green field.

meaning_en: a large place with many trees
example: We saw many animals in the forest yesterday.

meaning_en: a very high piece of land
example: They climbed the mountain on a sunny morning.

meaning_en: a piece of land with water all around it
example: We spent our holiday on a small island.

meaning_en: a long line of water that goes to the sea
example: The river in my town is very long and clean.

meaning_en: a large area of water with land around it
example: We often fish in the lake near our house.

meaning_en: the loud noise in the sky during a storm
example: The thunder was very loud during the storm.

meaning_en: water that has become hard because it is cold
example: The lake is covered with ice in winter.

meaning_en: to give out bright light
example: The stars shine in the dark sky at night.

meaning_en: to become very cold and hard like ice
example: Water freezes when the temperature is very low.

meaning_en: (of wind) to move quickly through the air
example: Strong winds blow across the field in autumn.

meaning_en: to become bigger over time
example: Plants grow well when there is enough rain.

meaning_en: from nature, not made by people
example: This is a beautiful natural park in our city.

meaning_en: living in nature, not kept by people
example: We saw some wild birds near the river.

meaning_en: a lot, with a lot of force
example: It is raining heavily, so we stay at home.

meaning_en: a flat area outside a window on an upper floor
example: Our flat has a small balcony with flowers.

meaning_en: the top inside surface of a room
example: There is a lamp on the ceiling of my bedroom.

meaning_en: a tall cupboard where you keep clothes
example: I keep all my clothes in the wardrobe.

meaning_en: a box in a desk or table that slides in and out
example: She put the keys in the top drawer of her desk.

meaning_en: a thick soft covering for floors
example: There is a red carpet on the living room floor.

meaning_en: cloth that hangs over a window
example: Please open the curtains and let the sun in.

meaning_en: glass that shows your face when you look in it
example: She looks at herself in the mirror every morning.

meaning_en: a soft bag you put your head on in bed
example: I need a new pillow for my bed.

meaning_en: a thick cover to keep you warm in bed
example: Put another blanket on the bed, it's cold.

meaning_en: a set of steps inside a building
example: My bedroom is up the stairs on the right.

meaning_en: the top covering of a building
example: The roof of our house is red.

meaning_vi: dọn dẹp, sắp xếp gọn gàng
meaning_en: to make a place neat and clean
example: Please tidy your room before dinner.

meaning_en: to pay money to use a house or room
example: We rent a small flat near the school.

meaning_en: not neat or tidy
example: His bedroom is always messy and full of toys.

meaning_en: on or to a higher floor of a building
example: Mum is upstairs in her bedroom.

meaning_en: a pain in your head.
example: I have a bad headache today.

meaning_en: the part of your body where food goes after you eat.
example: My stomach hurts after the big meal.

meaning_en: the middle part of your leg that bends.
example: He fell and hurt his right knee.

meaning_en: the part between your neck and your arm.
example: She carried the bag on her shoulder.

meaning_en: the organ in your chest that moves blood around your body.
example: Running is good for your heart.

meaning_en: the red liquid inside your body.
example: The doctor took some blood for the test.

meaning_en: one of the hard parts inside your body.
example: He broke a bone in his hand.

meaning_en: the outside part of your body.
example: Wash your hands to keep your skin clean.

meaning_en: the part inside your head that lets you think.
example: Your brain controls your whole body.

meaning_en: the inside of your neck that food goes down.
example: I have a sore throat and a cough.

meaning_en: something you take to feel better when you are ill.
example: Take this medicine after lunch.

meaning_en: to feel pain or to cause pain.
example: I hurt my hand playing football.

meaning_en: to measure how heavy something or someone is.
example: The nurse will weigh you now.

meaning_en: causing pain.
example: It is painful to walk on my foot.

meaning_vi: khỏe mạnh, tốt cho sức khỏe
meaning_en: strong and not ill; good for your body.
example: Fruit and vegetables are healthy food.

meaning_en: not well; sick.
example: She is ill and stays in bed.

meaning_en: an act of pushing air out of your throat with a noise.
example: He has a bad cough and a fever.

meaning_en: how hot your body is; a fever.
example: The nurse took my temperature.

meaning_en: an animal that you keep at home for company
example: My pet rabbit sleeps in a small cage.

meaning_en: a baby dog
example: The puppy is playing with a ball in the garden.

meaning_en: a baby cat
example: Our kitten has very soft white fur.

meaning_en: a baby sheep
example: The lamb is drinking milk from its mother.

meaning_en: a farm animal with horns that gives milk
example: The goat is eating grass on the hill.

meaning_en: a big desert animal with one or two humps
example: Camels can walk for days without water.

meaning_en: a small flying insect that makes honey
example: A bee is flying around the yellow flowers.

meaning_en: a small animal with six legs, like a fly or ant
example: The children are watching a small insect on the leaf.

meaning_en: a clever grey sea animal
example: Dolphins are very friendly and clever animals.

meaning_en: the long back part of an animal's body
example: The dog wags its tail when it is happy.

meaning_en: a box with bars to keep an animal in
example: The bird sings in its cage by the window.

meaning_en: to cut or hold something with your teeth
example: Be careful — that dog sometimes bites strangers.

meaning_en: to run after someone or something
example: The cat is chasing a butterfly in the garden.

meaning_en: to produce an egg (used for birds)
example: The hen lays one egg every morning.

meaning_en: feeling afraid
example: The frightened rabbit ran into the dark hole.

meaning_en: having a thin edge that can cut easily
example: Be careful — the cat has very sharp teeth.

meaning_en: quickly and without warning
example: Suddenly, the cat ran out of the room.

meaning_en: to stop sleeping and become awake
example: I wake up at six every morning.

meaning_en: a clock that makes a sound to wake you up
example: My alarm rings at six o'clock.

meaning_en: to clean something with a brush
example: I brush my teeth after breakfast.

meaning_en: to make your hair tidy with a comb
example: She combs her hair in the morning.

meaning_en: a wash where water falls on your body
example: He has a shower before school.

meaning_en: to put your clothes on
example: I get dressed quickly after my shower.

meaning_en: to go away from a place
example: We leave home at seven thirty.

meaning_en: to get on a bus or train in time
example: I catch the bus at the corner.

meaning_en: a short time to rest from work
example: We have a break at ten o'clock.

meaning_en: sleeping
example: The baby is asleep in his bed.

meaning_en: to clean something with water
example: I wash my face every morning.

meaning_en: a soft cloth you use to dry yourself
example: He dries his hands with a towel.

meaning_en: soft clothes you wear in bed
example: I wear my pyjamas at night.

meaning_en: happening every day
example: I read the daily newspaper every morning.

meaning_en: the person who tells you what to do at work
example: My boss is very kind to all the workers.

meaning_en: a person who controls a business or a team
example: The shop manager helps the customers every day.

meaning_en: a person who does a job, especially with their hands
example: The factory workers start work at eight o'clock.

meaning_en: a building where things are made or produced
example: My father works in a car factory in the city.

meaning_en: a person who repairs machines or cars
example: The mechanic fixed my bike in one hour.

meaning_en: a meeting where someone asks you questions for a job
example: I have a job interview at the bank on Monday.

meaning_en: an ability to do something well
example: You need good computer skills for this job.

meaning_en: the knowledge you get from doing a job
example: She has three years of work experience in a hotel.

meaning_en: work that involves buying and selling things

meaning_en: to get money for the work you do
example: She earns a lot of money as a doctor.

meaning_en: to give food or drink to customers
example: The café serves coffee and cakes all day.

meaning_en: to take things to a person or place
example: The postman delivers letters every morning.

meaning_en: to ask for a job by filling in a form
example: I want to apply for a job at the new supermarket.

meaning_en: working with a lot of effort
example: My sister is a hard-working student and worker.

meaning_en: working for only part of the week
example: He has a part-time job at the weekend.

meaning_en: a piece of clothing that covers your legs and has two parts, one for each leg
example: He bought a new pair of black trousers for the interview.

meaning_en: a short coat that covers your upper body and arms
example: She is wearing a warm jacket because it is cold.

meaning_en: a warm piece of clothing, usually made of wool, for the top half of your body
example: My grandmother made me a red sweater for winter.

meaning_en: a long piece of cloth that you wear around your neck to keep warm
example: She wrapped a thick scarf around her neck.

meaning_en: pieces of clothing that cover your hands and each finger
example: Wear gloves so your hands don't get cold.

meaning_en: a jacket and trousers (or a skirt) made of the same cloth and worn together
example: My father wears a dark suit to work every day.

meaning_en: a long piece of leather or cloth that you wear around your waist
example: He needs a new belt to hold up his jeans.

meaning_en: a small bag sewn into clothes where you can keep small things
example: I keep my phone in my jacket pocket.

meaning_en: hair that grows on a man's cheeks and chin
example: My uncle grew a long beard during the holidays.

meaning_en: good-looking; attractive, usually about a man
example: Her brother is a tall, handsome young man.

meaning_en: having yellow or light-coloured hair
example: The actress has long blonde hair and blue eyes.

meaning_en: having little or no hair on your head
example: My grandfather is bald but he looks very kind.

meaning_en: having hair that forms curves or waves
example: She has dark, curly hair like her mother.

meaning_en: thin in an attractive way
example: My sister is tall and slim and loves dancing.

meaning_en: to put a piece of clothing on your body
example: It's cold, so put on your coat before you go out.

meaning_vi: sự ô nhiễm (chất thải làm bẩn môi trường)
meaning_en: harmful substances that make air, water, or land dirty
example: Air pollution in the city is getting worse every year.

meaning_en: to make air, water, or land dirty and dangerous
example: Factory waste pollutes the river near our village.

meaning_en: to treat used things so they can be used again
example: We recycle paper, glass, and plastic at school every week.

meaning_vi: bảo vệ, giữ an toàn cho
meaning_en: to keep someone or something safe from harm
example: We must protect the forest to save the wild animals.

meaning_en: animals and plants that live in natural conditions
example: The national park is home to many kinds of wildlife.

meaning_vi: khí hậu (thời tiết trung bình lâu dài của một vùng)
meaning_en: the usual weather of a place over many years
example: The climate here is warm and wet in summer.

meaning_en: unwanted things that people throw away
example: Please put your waste in the bin, not on the ground.

meaning_en: a lot of water covering a place that is usually dry
example: The flood destroyed many houses near the river last year.

meaning_vi: hạn hán, đợt khô hạn dài
meaning_en: a long period with little or no rain
example: The drought caused farmers to lose most of their crops.

meaning_vi: rác vứt bừa bãi nơi công cộng
meaning_en: small pieces of rubbish left in public places

meaning_en: to make something smaller or less
example: We can reduce waste by using fewer plastic bags.

meaning_vi: đe dọa, gây nguy hiểm cho
meaning_en: to be a danger to someone or something
example: Pollution threatens the lives of many sea animals.

meaning_vi: sống sót, tiếp tục tồn tại
meaning_en: to stay alive after a dangerous situation
example: Only a few plants can survive in such dry conditions.

meaning_en: harm that makes something less good or useful
example: The storm caused serious damage to several farms.

meaning_vi: thuộc nông thôn, ở vùng quê
meaning_en: relating to the countryside, not the city
example: She grew up in a quiet rural area with green fields.

meaning_en: relating to a town or city
example: Air pollution is often worse in urban areas.

meaning_vi: thuộc mặt trời, dùng năng lượng mặt trời
meaning_en: using the sun's light or heat to produce energy
example: Many houses now use solar power to heat water.

meaning_en: to turn from ice or snow into water because of heat
example: The ice on the lake melts quickly in spring.

meaning_en: to make a tree fall to the ground with a tool
example: People should not cut down so many trees in the forest.

meaning_en: the type of work a person does for a long time
example: She wants to build a career in medicine.

meaning_en: a person who works for a company or another person
example: He is a hard-working employee who never arrives late.

meaning_vi: người sử dụng lao động, ông chủ
meaning_en: a person or company that gives work and pays people
example: Her employer gives staff three weeks of holiday a year.

meaning_en: a formal written request for a job or something else
example: Please send your job application to us before Friday afternoon.

meaning_vi: bằng cấp, trình độ chuyên môn
meaning_en: an exam or course that shows you are able to do a job
example: You need good qualifications to become a doctor.

meaning_en: a person you work with in the same place
example: My colleague helped me finish the report on time.

meaning_en: money that you get for working, usually paid every month
example: His salary went up after he got a pay rise.

meaning_vi: sự đào tạo, khóa huấn luyện
meaning_en: the process of learning the skills you need for a job
example: All new staff must complete a week of training.

meaning_en: a move to a higher and more important job
example: He was very happy about his promotion to manager.

meaning_en: to stop working, usually because of your age
example: My grandfather plans to retire from his job next year.

meaning_en: to give someone a job and pay them for working
example: The hotel wants to hire ten new waiters this summer.

meaning_en: a legal written agreement between people or companies
example: Both sides signed the work contract this morning.

meaning_vi: có trách nhiệm, chịu trách nhiệm
meaning_en: having the duty to take care of something or someone
example: She is responsible for the sales team at the office.

meaning_en: working all the usual hours of a week, not part-time
example: He is looking for a full-time job in the city.

meaning_en: in a way that achieves the result you wanted
example: She successfully finished the project before the deadline.

meaning_en: relating to a job that needs special education and skill
example: The doctor always behaves in a calm, professional way.

meaning_vi: thuộc học thuật, liên quan đến giáo dục
meaning_en: connected with education, especially at a school or university
example: She has excellent academic results in every subject.

meaning_en: an official document that proves you have completed a course or exam
example: He received a certificate after finishing the English course.

meaning_en: a qualification given by a university after finishing a course of study
example: My sister is studying for a degree in science.

meaning_en: a formal talk given to a group of students at university
example: The professor gave an interesting lecture on history.

meaning_en: money given to a student to help pay for their studies
example: He won a scholarship to study at a good university.

meaning_vi: gia sư, giáo viên phụ đạo
meaning_en: a teacher who gives lessons to one student or a small group
example: My tutor helps me with difficult maths problems.

meaning_en: to learn something so that you remember it exactly
example: You need to memorise these words for the test.

meaning_en: to give all your attention to what you are doing
example: I can't concentrate when the room is too noisy.

meaning_en: information and understanding that you gain from learning
example: Reading books helps you gain a lot of knowledge.

meaning_vi: sự tiến bộ, sự tiến triển
meaning_en: the process of improving or moving forward in your learning
example: The teacher is pleased with her progress this term.

meaning_en: to succeed in doing something or reaching a goal
example: He worked hard to achieve his dream of going to university.

meaning_vi: cải thiện, làm cho giỏi hơn
meaning_en: to make something better or become better
example: Her English has improved a lot this year.

meaning_en: to give a piece of work or homework to a teacher
example: You must hand in your project on Friday.

meaning_en: feeling worried or afraid before doing something, like an exam
example: He always feels nervous before a big exam.

meaning_en: the way that someone behaves or acts in class

meaning_en: to reach the same level as other people in your class

meaning_en: a talk in which you show and explain information to a class
example: She gave a presentation about climate change in class.

meaning_en: to give someone confidence or hope to do something
example: My teacher encourages me to speak English more often.

meaning_en: a place where you keep your personal information to use a website or service
example: I created a new account to use the website.

meaning_en: a file that you send together with an email
example: Please open the attachment to read the file.

meaning_en: by itself, without a person doing it
example: My phone saves the photos automatically when I take them.

meaning_en: a website where someone writes about their life or interests
example: She writes a blog about her favourite video games.

meaning_en: a thick wire that carries information or power between devices
example: I need a longer cable to connect the printer.

meaning_en: the way two computers or devices are joined so they can share information
example: The internet connection is very slow in my room.

meaning_en: a small machine or piece of equipment that does a particular job
example: This device can store thousands of photos and videos.

meaning_en: using computer technology to store and send information
example: She reads digital books on her tablet every night.

meaning_en: a computer file that contains text, like a letter or report
example: Don't forget to save your document before you close it.

meaning_en: to copy information from the internet onto your computer or phone

meaning_en: using electricity and small parts to work, like a computer

meaning_en: the physical parts of a computer that you can touch

meaning_en: to put a program onto a computer so it is ready to use
example: I will install the new program on my computer tonight.

meaning_en: a small computer that you can carry and use on your lap
example: My laptop is small and easy to carry to school.

meaning_en: a place on a website that takes you to another page when you click it
example: Click on this link to watch the video online.

meaning_en: to enter a computer or website by giving your name and password
example: You must log in with your username and password.

meaning_en: a group of computers that are connected to each other
example: Our school has a fast wireless network for all students.

meaning_en: a secret word that lets you use a computer or account
example: Use a strong password to keep your account safe.

meaning_en: the programs that tell a computer what to do
example: This software helps you edit your photos easily.

meaning_en: to send information from your computer to the internet
example: I will upload the video to my channel tomorrow.

meaning_en: a person you do not know
example: Never talk to strangers when you are alone on the street.

meaning_en: a relationship between friends
example: Their friendship has lasted for more than ten years.

meaning_en: the way people feel and behave towards each other
example: He has a good relationship with his parents.

meaning_en: to stop being angry with someone
example: I will never forgive him for telling lies about me.

meaning_en: to say you are sorry for something
example: You should apologise to her for being late.

meaning_en: unhappy because someone has what you want
example: She felt jealous when her friend got a new bike.

meaning_en: willing to give money or help to others
example: My uncle is very generous and often buys us presents.

meaning_en: sad because you are alone
example: He felt lonely after his best friend moved away.

meaning_en: sure about your own ability
example: She is confident that she will pass the exam.

meaning_en: caring only about yourself
example: It is selfish to eat all the cake and leave none for others.

meaning_en: to have a good relationship with someone
example: I get on well with my older sister.

meaning_en: to argue and stop being friends
example: The two boys fell out over a small toy.

meaning_en: to look or behave like an older relative
example: She takes after her mother in both looks and personality.

meaning_en: to trust someone to help you
example: You can always rely on your family when you are in trouble.

meaning_en: a disagreement or angry discussion
example: They had a big argument about money last night.

meaning_en: the place where someone is going or where something is sent
example: Paris is a popular holiday destination for tourists.

meaning_en: a place to stay or live, such as a hotel or a room
example: We booked cheap accommodation near the beach.

meaning_en: a short trip for pleasure, usually made by a group
example: The hotel offers a free excursion to the old town.

meaning_en: something you keep to remember a place you visited
example: I bought a small souvenir for my mother.

meaning_en: a place where many people go for a holiday
example: They spent two weeks at a sunny seaside resort.

meaning_en: the natural features of a place, such as mountains and trees
example: The scenery in the mountains was beautiful.

meaning_vi: tờ rơi, cẩm nang du lịch
meaning_en: a thin book with pictures and information about something
example: I picked up a travel brochure at the agency.

meaning_vi: địa danh, công trình nổi bật
meaning_en: a famous building or object that is easy to recognise
example: The Eiffel Tower is a famous landmark in Paris.

meaning_en: a journey on a large ship for pleasure
example: They went on a cruise around the Mediterranean.

meaning_en: the money that is used in a particular country
example: You need to change money into local currency.

meaning_en: to leave a place, especially at the start of a journey
example: The train will depart from platform three.

meaning_vi: mở hành lý, lấy đồ ra
meaning_en: to take things out of a bag or suitcase
example: I unpacked my clothes as soon as I arrived.

meaning_en: to travel around a place to find out what it is like
example: We hired a bike to explore the island.

meaning_en: to sit or lie in the sun to get a tan

meaning_en: to wait in a line of people
example: We had to queue for an hour at the airport.

meaning_en: giving pleasure; pleasant
example: The boat trip was really enjoyable for everyone.

meaning_en: easy to remember because it is special or pleasant
example: It was a memorable holiday for the whole family.

meaning_en: across the sea; in or to another country
example: My parents travelled overseas last summer.

meaning_en: through a place; by way of
example: We flew to Rome via Frankfurt.

meaning_en: to start a journey
example: We set off early to avoid the traffic.

meaning_en: a picture, short film or message that tries to make people buy something

meaning_en: the people who watch or listen to a show, film or programme
example: The audience laughed a lot during the funny film.

meaning_en: to send out a programme on television or radio
example: They will broadcast the football match live tonight.

meaning_en: a film or programme that gives facts about real life

meaning_en: one part of a story on television or radio

meaning_en: a famous person, often from television, film or music

meaning_en: a person who writes news for a newspaper, website or TV

meaning_en: things like films, music or shows that people enjoy

meaning_en: to pay or sign up to get a service, channel or magazine

meaning_en: the title of a news story printed in big letters
example: The headline in today's newspaper was about the storm.

meaning_en: the music that is played during a film
example: I really love the soundtrack from that adventure film.

meaning_en: a person whose job is to make people laugh
example: The comedian told jokes and everyone laughed loudly.

meaning_en: to sing, act or play music in front of people
example: The band will perform at the school concert tonight.

meaning_en: an event where people sing, act or play music
example: Her performance in the play was really wonderful.

meaning_en: a set of television programmes with the same story or people
example: My favourite TV series has three new episodes this week.

meaning_en: funny or interesting, so people enjoy it
example: The show was very entertaining and made us laugh.

meaning_en: happening now and shown at the same time
example: We watched a live concert on television yesterday.

meaning_en: television, radio, newspapers and the internet together
example: The news spread quickly through social media.

meaning_en: a report that says if a film, book or show is good or bad
example: I read a good review before I watched the new film.

meaning_en: to store sound or pictures so you can watch or hear them later
example: Can you record the film so we can watch it tomorrow?

meaning_en: a disease or period of being unwell
example: She missed two weeks of school because of a serious illness.

meaning_vi: sự điều trị, cách chữa trị
meaning_en: the way a doctor helps a sick or injured person get better
example: The doctor gave him treatment for his broken arm.

meaning_en: to become healthy again after being ill or hurt
example: It took her a month to recover from the flu.

meaning_en: a sign that shows you may have an illness
example: A high temperature is a common symptom of the flu.

meaning_en: damage to your body caused by an accident

meaning_en: to make an ill person healthy again
example: These new medicines can cure many diseases.

meaning_en: to feel pain or have an illness or problem

meaning_en: a feeling of worry caused by a difficult situation

meaning_en: feeling worried and unable to relax

meaning_en: the state of being strong and healthy

meaning_en: a note from a doctor that lets you buy medicine

meaning_en: when a doctor cuts your body to fix a health problem
example: He needs an operation on his knee next week.

meaning_en: connected with the mind or thinking
example: Good sleep is important for your mental health.

meaning_en: connected with the body, not the mind
example: Sport is a great way to stay in good physical shape.

meaning_en: to take air into your body and let it out
example: After the race it was hard for him to breathe.

meaning_en: an illness caused by germs entering the body
example: The cut on his hand caused a bad infection.

meaning_en: feeling like everything is turning around you
example: I felt dizzy after standing up too quickly.

meaning_en: doing something often and at the same times
example: You should exercise regularly to stay healthy.

meaning_en: a long piece of cloth you wrap around a wound
example: The nurse put a clean bandage on my arm.

meaning_en: a custom or way of doing things passed down for many years

meaning_en: the way of life, art and beliefs of a group of people

meaning_en: a belief in one or more gods and the ways people show it
example: People of many different religions live together in this city.

meaning_en: to do something special because of a happy event or day

meaning_en: all the people who live in the same area or place

meaning_en: a large group of people who live together in an organised way

meaning_en: something that people in a place usually do

meaning_en: a formal event with special actions for an important occasion
example: The wedding ceremony took place in a beautiful old church.

meaning_en: a special time when people celebrate something together

meaning_en: all the people of about the same age in a family or society

meaning_en: following ideas or ways that have existed for a long time
example: She wore a beautiful traditional dress at the festival.

meaning_en: connected with the culture of a society or group
example: The museum shows many cultural objects from around the world.

meaning_en: the number of people living in a place

meaning_en: a person who belongs to a particular country

meaning_en: to treat someone or something in a polite and caring way
example: We should respect people from different cultures and beliefs.

meaning_en: a strong feeling that something is true or real
example: It is his belief that all people should be treated equally.

meaning_en: belonging to the present time and using new ideas

meaning_en: belonging to or coming from another country
example: Many foreign tourists come to see our famous old temples.

meaning_en: a large group of people in one place
example: A big crowd gathered in the square to watch the parade.

meaning_en: feeling worried and unable to relax about something
example: She looked anxious while waiting for her test results.

meaning_en: sad because something was not as good as you hoped
example: I was disappointed when the trip was cancelled.

meaning_en: feeling shy or ashamed in front of other people
example: She was embarrassed when she forgot her friend's name.

meaning_en: feeling that you want to thank someone for something
example: I am really grateful to you for helping me today.

meaning_en: happy and showing it in the way you behave
example: She gave me a cheerful smile this morning.

meaning_en: a strong feeling such as love, fear, or anger
example: He could not hide his emotions when he heard the news.

meaning_en: the way you feel at a particular time
example: My dad is in a good mood because it's the weekend.

meaning_en: the bad feeling you have when you are afraid
example: She has a strong fear of spiders.

meaning_en: a happy feeling because you or others have done something well
example: Her parents watched with pride as she won the prize.

meaning_en: a feeling of being sorry for someone who has problems
example: I felt a lot of sympathy for my sick friend.

meaning_en: to respect or like someone very much
example: I really admire my teacher for her patience.

meaning_en: to make someone feel sad or worried
example: The sad film really upset my little sister.

meaning_vi: vui lên, làm ai vui hơn

example: I gave her some flowers to cheer her up.

meaning_en: in a way that shows you are worried or afraid
example: He nervously waited for his turn to speak.

meaning_vi: một cách tuyệt vọng, khẩn thiết
meaning_en: in a way that shows you want or need something very much
